data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for human escalation for high-value accounts.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for human escalation for high-value accounts, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete instances of this requirement being satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for human escalation but lacks specific evidence of its implementation or execution. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as there is no direct evidence of the requirement's fulfillment.
gaps: No evidence of human escalation for high-value accounts.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
